note: Toast-banner conformance ratchet baseline (shrink-only) for this connector, enforced by the reusable toast-banner-gate (cinatra-ai/cinatra#1213 AC3). Each entry is a src/ file that CURRENTLY renders a searchParams-flash-driven transient banner (a success/destructive <Alert> or a flash-palette colored <div> gated on a transient-outcome query param). The canonical transient-notification layer is the toast island: route flash outcomes through the codes-only <SearchParamToast> island (@cinatra-ai/sdk-ui) and imperative notifications through cinatraToast / useNotify. The gate FAILS when a file NOT in this baseline starts matching (a new/reintroduced banner) and when a baseline entry no longer matches (it must be REMOVED — the ratchet only shrinks). class=pending-migration entries are transient banners still awaiting migration to the island (they must ratchet to zero); class=adjudicated-inline entries are epic-sanctioned inline surfaces the heuristic also flags — permanent, each with a reason. This connector is banner-free on main; the empty baseline is committed explicitly so a future deletion is a visible, reviewable diff (zero-tolerance).
